name: gillem-logistics-corridor
rationale: Gillem Logistics Center (2135 Anvil Block Rd, Forest Park) is the canonical Safewalk demo corridor per DESIGN.md §11 — transit workers walk 1.5-2 mi along sidewalk-less arterials from MARTA bus stops to the Kroger DC and other employers inside. Bbox spans MARTA Route 195 stops to the west/north (Jonesboro Rd, Main St) and the logistics campus on the southeast.
backup_corridor: west-atlanta-belvedere (per DESIGN.md §11 / §14 if reroute path fails)
